Class FloatParameter

java.lang.Object
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.Parameter<Float>
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.NumberParameter<Float>
io.github.isoyigido.basic.gui.core.loader.parameters.numbers.FloatParameter
public class FloatParameter extends NumberParameter<Float>
Represents a number parameter for Float values. Uses the parser function Float.parseFloat(String). Provides the methods positive(), negative(), notNegative() and notPositive() for creating new FloatParameter instances that are only allowed to store positive, negative, non-negative, and non-positive floating-point numbers respectively.
See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • FloatParameter

      public FloatParameter()
      Constructs a number parameter for floating-point numbers with the parser function Float.parseFloat(String).

  • Method Details

    • positive

      public static FloatParameter positive()
      Returns a new FloatParameter instance that is only allowed to store positive values.
      Returns:
      the new FloatParameter instance
      Implementation Note:
      This method creates a new FloatParameter instance with the default parameterless constructor, and sets its minimum allowed value to 1.401298464324817E-45f.

    • negative

      public static FloatParameter negative()
      Returns a new FloatParameter instance that is only allowed to store negative values.
      Returns:
      the new FloatParameter instance
      Implementation Note:
      This method creates a new FloatParameter instance with the default parameterless constructor, and sets its maximum allowed value to -1.401298464324817E-45f.

    • notNegative

      public static FloatParameter notNegative()
      Returns a new FloatParameter instance that is only allowed to store non-negative values.
      Returns:
      the new FloatParameter instance
      Implementation Note:
      This method creates a new FloatParameter instance with the default parameterless constructor, and sets its minimum allowed value to 0.

    • notPositive

      public static FloatParameter notPositive()
      Returns a new FloatParameter instance that is only allowed to store non-positive values.
      Returns:
      the new FloatParameter instance
      Implementation Note:
      This method creates a new FloatParameter instance with the default parameterless constructor, and sets its maximum allowed value to 0.
